case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS REAGAN, WILLIE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,482.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT REAGAN, WILLIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-10-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
